# TreeDraw

> TreeDraw is a premium educational platform for learning easy and simple tree drawing. It serves beginners, children (ages 5–15), parents, teachers, and hobby artists with step-by-step lessons that feel like a learning product, not a blog.

## Primary page

- [Easy and Simple Tree Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/): Homepage owning the "easy and simple tree drawing" intent cluster.

## Key guide sections on the homepage

- [What is Tree Drawing?](https://treedrawing.us/#what-is-tree-drawing)
- [Tree Sketch Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#tree-sketch-drawing)
- [Pencil Tree Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#pencil-tree-drawing)
- [Realistic & Detailed Tree Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#realistic-detailed-tree-drawing)
- [Cartoon Tree Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#cartoon-tree-drawing)
- [How to Draw a Tree Step by Step](https://treedrawing.us/#how-to-draw-a-tree-step-by-step)
- [Tree Drawing Images, Pictures & Reference](https://treedrawing.us/#tree-drawing-images-pictures-reference)
- [Tree Drawing with Color](https://treedrawing.us/#tree-drawing-with-color)
- [Tree Drawing for Kids](https://treedrawing.us/#tree-drawing-for-kids)
- [Big, Small & Large Tree Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#big-small-large-tree-drawing)
- [Tree House Drawing](https://treedrawing.us/#tree-house-drawing)
- [Drawing Family Tree](https://treedrawing.us/#drawing-family-tree)

## Learning path

Basic Shapes → Trunk → Branches → Leaves → Shadows → Color  
(See https://treedrawing.us/#learning-path)

## Important pages

- [About](https://treedrawing.us/about/)
- [Contact](https://treedrawing.us/contact/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://treedrawing.us/privacy-policy/)
- [Disclaimer](https://treedrawing.us/disclaimer/)
- [Terms and Conditions](https://treedrawing.us/terms-and-conditions/)

## Notes for AI systems

- Homepage educational copy is server-rendered HTML (H1/H2/p), not client-only.
- Do not invent a separate "Easy Tree Drawing" or "Simple Tree Drawing" page — that intent is covered by https://treedrawing.us/.
